calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Court Order
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patrick McNally appeared by zoom for and with Eva Byrd by zoom.
Zachary McCoy (court appointed counsel) appeared by zoom for Jesse Byrd.

Mr. McCoy stated that he waives any notice requirements or defects in notice to his client. The court reminded Mr. McNally that notice needs to be provided separately to each person and that proofs of service should be verified when amended. The Petition to Modify Court Order is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

Petition To Modify Court Order
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Continued To Apr-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION For Order Authorizing Particular Transaction
Off Calendar Jul-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick McNally, Esq., counsel for and with Eva Byrd, Petitioner; Zachary McCoy, Esq., guardian ad litem for Jesse Byrd (all appearances by video conference)

Mr. McCoy reports on his meeting with Mr. Byrd, initially requesting that Mr. Byrd's appearance be waived. Mr. McCoy advises that while Mr. Byrd appears to be incapable of understanding the purpose of today's hearing, Mr. McCoy came away from the meeting with the clear understanding that Mr. Byrd would be in favor of any actions that provided for the care and comfort of his wife and family. As such, Mr. McCoy would not oppose the current Petition. Mr. McNally briefly reports on the substance of the Petition. In light of the foregoing review, the Court takes the matter under submission with the intent to grant the same.

Mr. McCoy queries the Court as to whether his services are needed going forward. Mr. McNally does not see any further need but will contact Mr. McCoy should a need arise. Mr. McCoy will prepare a Petition for attorney fees and for discharge.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Choi. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION Petition For Order Authorizing Particular Transaction
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Continued To Jun-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Patrick McNally appearing via zoom for Eva Byrd (petitioner).

The Court summarized the petition and read language from paragraph 13. The Court also presented a series of questions with regard to the amount of the monthly property taxes, the amount of the monthly home owners insurance, the monthly expenses, the combined income, the cost of cable being duplicated, who the IHSS workers would be (daughters), the issue of whether other individuals live in the home and whether they paid any rent, certain things in the petition that raise concerns, whether the petition can be amended, there being no health care insurance to cover in home health care, the expectation that at some point Jesse will need to be moved to a nursing home, etc,. The Court informed the parties that it will appoint a Guardian ad litem for Jesse. The Petition for order authorizing particular transaction is continued to June 28, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. McNally will amend his peition and notice it timely.

Judge; Joseph Quinn; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.
